/CAL:HEARING TO READ REMITTITUR ONTO THE RECORD/X:THE REMITTITUR IS SPREADONTO THE MINUTES AS FOLLOWS:/CTORD:THE JUDGMENT IS MODIFIED TO REDUCE THERESTITUTION AND PAROLE REVOCATION FINES TO $200 EACH AND TO STRIKE THE TWOONE-YEAR ENHANCEMENTS IMPOSED PURSUANT TO SECTION 667,5 SUBDIVISION (B), IN ALL OTHER RESPECTS, THE JUDGMENT IS AFFIRMED, THE SUPERIOUR COURT CLERK SHALL CORRECT THE ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT AND FORWARD THE CORRECTED ABSTRACT TOTHE DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS AND REHABILITATION,/
